Home.heroTitle: Pasipoti ya Chapa Yako Kwenda China — Kutoka Utiifu hadi Biashara
Home.heroSubtitle: Huduma za udhibiti wa uagizaji kwa njia moja kwa vyakula, vipodozi, elektroniki, na zaidi.
Home.servicesSubtitle: Msaada wa kisheria wa mwanzo hadi mwisho kwa chapa zinazoingia sokoni la China.
Home.whySubtitle: Mshirika wako wa kuaminika kwa kusogeza kanuni za uagizaji wa China.
Home.whyCard1Desc: Kutoka vyakula na vipodozi hadi elektroniki na nguo — tunafunika mahitaji yote ya utiifu chini ya paa moja.
Home.whyCard2Desc: Usajili, uwekaji lebo, uthibitisho, chapa, biashara ya mtandao — timu moja inashughulikia yote.
Home.whyCard3Desc: Bei wazi bila gharama zilizofichwa. Unajua kile unacholipia.
Home.whyCard4Desc: Miaka ya uzoefu wa kusaidia chapa za kimataifa kufanikiwa sokoni la China.
Home.processSubtitle: Hatua nne rahisi kutoka uchunguzi hadi kuingia sokoni kwa utiifu.
Home.processStep1Desc: Tuambie kuhusu bidhaa na malengo yako. Tunathmini mahitaji yako ya utiifu bila gharama.
Home.processStep2Desc: Tunabuni ramani ya utiifu iliyobinafsishwa kwa bidhaa na ratiba yako.
Home.processStep3Desc: Timu yetu inashughulikia usajili, faili, uthibitisho, na hati zote.
Home.processStep4Desc: Bidhaa zako zina utiifu kamili na ziko tayari kwa soko la China.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Pata tathmini ya utiifu bure kwa bidhaa zako leo.
Home.processStep5Desc: We verify all documentation and certifications meet Chinese regulatory standards.
Home.processStep6Desc: Ongoing compliance monitoring and regulatory updates to keep your business running smoothly.

ServiceGacc.heroSubtitle: Sogeza mahitaji ya usajili wa chakula ya Amri 248/249 ya China kwa mwongozo wa wataalamu.
ServiceGacc.coverItems: Uundaji na usimamizi wa akaunti ya CIFER,Tathmini ya hatari ya aina 18 (hatari ya juu dhidi ya chini),Uoanishaji wa msimbo HS/CIQ kwa bidhaa zako,Maandalizi kamili ya hati na tafsiri,Ukaguzi wa utiifu wa lebo (GB 7718 / GB 28050),Upyaishaji wa usajili na ufuatiliaji wa uhalali wa miaka 5
ServiceGacc.howSteps: Tathmini ya Bidhaa — Tunakagua aina ya bidhaa yako na kubaini mahitaji ya GACC yanayotumika.,Usajili wa CIFER — Tunaunda na kusimamia usajili wako kupitia mfumo wa CIFER wa China.,Hati — Fomu zote, tafsiri, na hati za kusaidia zinaandaliwa na kuwasilishwa.,Idhini na Ufuatiliaji — Tunafuatilia mchakato wa idhini na kusimamia upyaishaji wa usajili wako.
ServiceGacc.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceGacc.faq1a: GACC Decree 248 is a Chinese regulation requiring all overseas food manufacturers to register with the General Administration of Customs of China (GACC) before exporting food products to China. It applies to all 18 food categories and took effect January 1, 2022.
ServiceGacc.faq2q: How long does GACC registration take?
ServiceGacc.faq2a: Registration typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on the product category and completeness of documentation. We handle the entire process including document preparation, translation, and submission through the CIFER system.
ServiceGacc.faq3q: What documents are needed for registration?
ServiceGacc.faq3a: Key documents include: business license, production facility information, product list with HS codes, quality management certificates (ISO 22000/HACCP), and product labels. We provide a complete checklist and assist with document preparation.
ServiceGacc.faq4a: No, GACC registration is valid for 5 years. Renewal must be submitted 6 months before expiration. We provide renewal reminders and handle the entire renewal process on your behalf.

ServiceLabel.heroSubtitle: Hakikisha lebo za bidhaa zako zinakidhi viwango vya lazima vya uwekaji lebo vya China.
ServiceLabel.coverItems: Utiifu wa lebo ya chakula kilichofungwa kabla GB 7718-2025,Mahitaji ya lebo ya lishe GB 28050-2025,Uthibitisho wa vipengele 9 vya lazima (jina, viungo, uzito halisi, tarehe, uhifadhi, nk),Muundo wa lebo ya Kichina maalum,Uundaji wa kiolezo cha lebo kwa uzalishaji,Msaada wa lebo ya ufasishaji wa forodha
ServiceLabel.howSteps: Ukaguzi wa Lebo — Tunakagua lebo zako za sasa dhidi ya mahitaji ya kanuni za China.,Uchambuzi wa Pengo — Tambua vipengele vinavyokosekana au visivyo na utiifu.,Muundo na Marekebisho — Unda lebo za Kichina zenye utiifu na vipengele vyote vya lazima.,Faili Tayari kwa Uzalishaji — Wasilisha faili za lebo tayari kwa uchapaji kwa timu yako ya uzalishaji.
ServiceLabel.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceLabel.faq1a: Chinese label compliance means your product labels must meet China's GB 7718 and GB 28050 standards. This includes mandatory elements like product name, ingredients, nutrition facts, manufacturer info, and Chinese translations.
ServiceLabel.faq2q: Can I use my existing labels with a Chinese sticker?
ServiceLabel.faq2a: In some cases, yes. Supplemental Chinese stickers can be applied at the port of entry for certain products. However, pre-printed Chinese labels are preferred and often required for retail sales. We assess your specific situation and recommend the best approach.
ServiceLabel.faq3q: What happens if my labels are non-compliant?
ServiceLabel.faq3a: Non-compliant labels can result in customs rejection, product seizure, fines, or forced product recalls. Ensuring label compliance before shipping prevents these costly issues.
ServiceLabel.faq4q: Do you design the labels too?
ServiceLabel.faq4a: Yes, we provide complete label services: compliance review against GB standards, custom label design in Chinese, and production-ready files for your printer. We also provide guidance on port-of-entry sticker applications.

ServiceCcc.heroSubtitle: Uthibitisho wa Lazima wa China kwa elektroniki, vifaa, vichezo, na vipengele vya magari.
ServiceCcc.coverItems: Tathmini ya saraka ya CCC — thibitisha ikiwa bidhaa yako inahitaji uthibitisho,Uratibu wa upimaji na maabara zilizoidhinishwa na CNCA,Maandalizi na uwasilishaji wa maombi,Maandalizi ya ukaguzi wa kiwanda,Msaada wa ufuatiliaji wa utiifu wa kila mwaka,Aina mpya za 2025 zinazojumuisha betri za lithiamu-ioni
ServiceCcc.howSteps: Tathmini ya Ustahiki — Bainisha ikiwa bidhaa yako ipo kwenye saraka ya lazima ya CCC.,Upimaji — Uratibu upimaji wa aina katika maabara ya China iliyoidhinishwa.,Maombi — Andaa na uwasilishe maombi ya uthibitisho na hati zote zinazohitajika.,Uthibitisho — Pokea cheti chako cha CCC na udumisha utiifu wa kila mwaka.
ServiceCcc.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceCcc.faq1a: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a mandatory safety certification for products sold in China. It covers electronics, automotive parts, toys, safety glass, and other product categories listed in the CCC catalog.
ServiceCcc.faq2q: Does my product need CCC certification?
ServiceCcc.faq2a: Products listed in China's CCC catalog require certification before they can be imported, sold, or used commercially. We provide a free catalog assessment to determine if your products fall under CCC requirements.
ServiceCcc.faq3q: How long does CCC certification take?
ServiceCcc.faq3a: The CCC process typically takes 4-8 months including factory audit, product testing at CNAS-accredited labs, and certification review. Timeline varies by product category and complexity.
ServiceCcc.faq4q: Can CCC certification be done from overseas?
ServiceCcc.faq4a: Yes, but it requires coordination with Chinese testing labs and certification bodies. We act as your local representative, managing factory audits, sample testing, and all communications with certifying authorities.

ServiceCosmetics.heroSubtitle: Usajili na faili kamili ya NMPA kwa vipodozi vilivyoagizwa nchini China.
ServiceCosmetics.coverItems: Faili ya vipodozi vya kawaida (utunzaji wa ngozi, mapambo, utunzaji wa nywele),Usajili wa vipodozi maalum (kinga ya jua, kung'aa, rangi ya nywele),Uteuzi wa wakala anayehusika wa China,Uratibu wa tathmini ya usalama,Msaada wa upimaji wa ufanisi kwa kazi zilizotajwa,Asili ya utiifu wa soko (ufuatiliaji wa matukio mabaya, ripoti za kila mwaka)
ServiceCosmetics.howSteps: Uainishaji wa Bidhaa — Bainisha ikiwa bidhaa yako ni vipodozi vya kawaida au maalum.,Wakala Anayehusika — Teua shirika lenye makao nchini China.,Upimaji wa Usalama na Ufanisi — Uratibu upimaji unaohitajika katika maabara zilizoidhinishwa.,Faili/Usajili — Wasilisha maombi kwa NMPA na usimamie mchakato wa idhini.
ServiceCosmetics.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceCosmetics.faq1a: NMPA (National Medical Products Administration) filing is required for all cosmetics imported into China. General cosmetics require notification filing, while special-use cosmetics (sunscreen, hair dye, whitening) require registration approval.
ServiceCosmetics.faq2q: What's the difference between notification and registration?
ServiceCosmetics.faq2a: Notification filing (for general cosmetics) takes approximately 4-6 months and involves product safety assessment and ingredient review. Registration (for special cosmetics) takes 12-18 months and requires efficacy testing and safety evaluation.
ServiceCosmetics.faq3q: Do I need a Chinese responsible person?
ServiceCosmetics.faq3a: Yes, all imported cosmetics must designate a Chinese境内责任人 (domestic responsible person) who assumes legal responsibility for product quality and safety. We can serve as your境内责任人.
ServiceCosmetics.faq4q: Can I sell cosmetics through cross-border e-commerce without NMPA?
ServiceCosmetics.faq4a: Yes, cross-border e-commerce (CBEC) channels allow cosmetics sales without NMPA filing under certain conditions. This is a faster market entry route while you prepare full NMPA compliance.

ServiceEcommerce.heroSubtitle: Zindua chapa yako kwenye majukwaa yanayoongoza ya biashara ya mtandao ya mpakani ya China.
ServiceEcommerce.coverItems: Kuingia jukwaa (Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Douyin Global),Usanidi wa ghala la bonded (1210) na usafirishaji wa moja kwa moja (9610),Ulanishaji wa hati tatu (agizo, malipo, logistics),Uboreshaji wa kodi ya mpakani (forodha 0% ndani ya mipaka),Mwongozo wa msamaha wa lebo ya Kichina kwa mauzo ya mpakani,Utiifu wa data (PIPL) kwa shughuli za mpakani
ServiceEcommerce.howSteps: Uchaguzi wa Jukwaa — Chagua jukwaa sahihi kwa chapa na bidhaa zako.,Kuingia — Maliza usajili wa jukwaa na mahitaji ya utiifu.,Usanidi wa Logistics — Anzisha ghala la bonded au njia za usafirishaji wa moja kwa moja.,Uzinduzi — Anza na orodha za bidhaa na masoko yenye utiifu.
ServiceEcommerce.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceEcommerce.faq1a: We support all major Chinese e-commerce platforms: Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Douyin (TikTok China), Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), and Pinduoduo. We handle platform registration, store setup, and ongoing compliance.
ServiceEcommerce.faq2a: Cross-border e-commerce requires three documents to match for each order: the order document, payment document, and logistics document. This is a customs requirement for CBEC goods. We ensure your operations comply with this requirement.
ServiceEcommerce.faq3q: How long to set up a cross-border store?
ServiceEcommerce.faq3a: Platform registration typically takes 2-4 weeks. Store setup, product listing, and operational readiness usually takes an additional 2-4 weeks depending on product complexity and platform requirements.
ServiceEcommerce.faq4q: Do cross-border products need Chinese labels?
ServiceEcommerce.faq4a: CBEC products are generally exempt from Chinese label requirements since they are considered personal imports. However, product information must be provided in Chinese on the e-commerce platform. We guide you on platform-specific requirements.

ServiceBrand.heroSubtitle: Linda mali yako ya kiakili na utambulisho wa chapa sokoni la China.
ServiceBrand.coverItems: Utafutaji wa alama ya biashara na tathmini ya upatikanaji,Usajili wa alama ya biashara (maombi ya moja kwa moja ya CNIPA),Teuo la mfumo wa Madrid kwa China,Rekodi ya mali ya kiakili ya forodha,Ukaguzi wa utiifu wa matangazo (Sheria ya Matangazo ya China),Mkakati wa ulinzi wa chapa na mwongozo wa utekelezaji
ServiceBrand.howSteps: Utafutaji wa Alama ya Biashara — Thibitisha upatikanaji na tambua migogoro inayoweza kutokea.,Usajili — Wasilisha maombi ya alama ya biashara kwa CNIPA au kupitia mfumo wa Madrid.,Rekodi ya Forodha — Sajili alama yako ya biashara na Forodha ya China kwa ulinzi wa mpaka.,Ulinzi Unaoendelea — Fuatilia ukiukaji na udumisha utiifu wa matangazo.
ServiceBrand.questionsSubtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about this service.
ServiceBrand.faq1q: Why do I need trademark registration in China?
ServiceBrand.faq1a: China follows a "first-to-file" trademark system. Without registration, someone else can register your trademark first and prevent you from using it. Early registration is essential for brand protection.
ServiceBrand.faq2q: How long does trademark registration take?
ServiceBrand.faq2a: The process typically takes 8-12 months from application to registration. This includes formal examination, publication period, and certificate issuance. We handle the entire process and monitor for oppositions.
ServiceBrand.faq3a: The Madrid System allows you to extend an existing trademark registration to multiple countries, including China, through a single application. It can be faster and more cost-effective than direct filing in China.
ServiceBrand.faq4q: How do I protect against counterfeit products?
ServiceBrand.faq4a: We provide comprehensive brand protection: trademark registration, customs IP recordal (allowing customs to seize counterfeit goods), advertising compliance review, and ongoing monitoring. Early registration is the most important first step.

Faq.heroSubtitle: Majibu kwa maswali ya kawaida kuhusu uagizaji kwenda China na utiifu wa kanuni.
Faq.gaccA1: Amri 248 ya GACC ni kanuni ya China kuhusu usajili wa watengenezaji, wasindikaji, na vifaa vya uhifadhi wa vyakula vya ng'ambo. Imekuwa ya lazima tangu Januari 1, 2022. Wasafirishaji nje wote wa vyakula kwenda China lazima wasajiliwe kupitia mfumo wa CIFER wa China.
Faq.gaccQ2: Usajili wa GACC unachukua muda gani?
Faq.gaccA2: Muda hutofautiana kulingana na aina ya bidhaa. Bidhaa za hatari ya chini (sio aina 18) kwa kawaida zinaweza kusajiliwa ndani ya wiki 2-4. Bidhaa za hatari ya juu (aina 18) zinahitaji mapendekezo ya serikali na zinaweza kuchukua miezi kadhaa.
Faq.gaccQ3: Je, usajili wa GACC ni wa lazima kwa bidhaa zote za chakula?
Faq.gaccA3: Ndiyo. Bidhaa zote za chakula zinazosafirishwa nje kwenda China zinahitaji usajili wa GACC, bila kujali aina ya bidhaa au kiasi. Bila hivyo, bidhaa zako haziwezi kufasishwa na forodha ya China.
Faq.gaccQ4: Muda wa uhalali wa usajili wa GACC ni upi?
Faq.gaccA4: Usajili wa GACC ni halali kwa miaka 5. Maombi ya upyaishaji lazima yawasilishwe miezi 3-6 kabla ya kumalizika.
Faq.labelQ1: Kwa nini ninahitaji lebo za Kichina?
Faq.labelA1: Uwekaji lebo wa Kichina ni wa lazima kwa bidhaa nyingi zilizoagizwa zinazouzwa nchini China. Lebo zisizo na utiifu zinaweza kusababisha kukataliwa na forodha, kuita bidhaa nyuma, na adhabu.
Faq.labelQ2: Vipengele vya lazima vya lebo ni vipi?
Faq.labelA2: Kwa chakula kilichofungwa kabla, GB 7718-2025 inahitaji: jina la bidhaa, orodha ya viungo, maudhui halisi, tarehe ya uzalishaji/kuisha, hali za uhifadhi, habari ya mtengenezaji, na maelezo ya wakala wa Kichina.
Faq.cccQ1: Ni bidhaa gani zinazohitaji uthibitisho wa CCC?
Faq.cccA1: Uthibitisho wa CCC ni wa lazima kwa bidhaa katika aina 17 zinazojumuisha vifaa vya nyumbani, vifaa vya IT, taa, sehemu za magari, vichezo vya watoto, na betri za lithiamu-ioni (iliongezwa 2024).
Faq.cccQ2: Uthibitisho wa CCC unachukua muda gani?
Faq.cccA2: Kwa kawaida miezi 2-6 kulingana na utata wa bidhaa, mahitaji ya upimaji, na mahitaji ya ukaguzi wa kiwanda.
Faq.cosmeticsQ1: Tofauti kati ya vipodozi vya kawaida na maalum ni nini?
Faq.cosmeticsA1: Vipodozi vya kawaida (utunzaji wa ngozi, mapambo, utunzaji wa nywele) vinahitaji faili na NMPA. Vipodozi maalum (kinga ya jua, kung'aa, rangi ya nywele, kuondoa freckle) vinahitaji usajili kamili, ambao unachukua muda mrefu zaidi na unahusisha upimaji zaidi.
Faq.ecommerceQ1: Je, bado ninahitaji usajili wa GACC kwa biashara ya mtandao ya mpakani?
Faq.ecommerceA1: Ndiyo. Bidhaa za chakula zinazouzwa kupitia biashara ya mtandao ya mpakani bado zinahitaji usajili wa GACC. Hata hivyo, mahitaji mengine (kama lebo za Kichina) yanaweza kusamehewa kwa mauzo ya mpakani.
Faq.ecommerceQ2: Mipaka ya ununuzi kwa biashara ya mtandao ya mpakani ni upi?
Faq.ecommerceA2: Mipaka ya muamala mmoja: ¥5,000. Mipaka ya kila mwaka kwa mteja: ¥26,000. Ndani ya mipaka hii, forodha ni 0% na VAT/kodi ya matumizi inalipwa kwa 70%.
Faq.brandQ1: Je, ninapaswa kusajili alama yangu ya biashara kabla ya kuingia China?
Faq.brandA1: Kabisa. China inafuata mfumo wa kwanza kuwasilisha alama ya biashara. Kama hutawasili, mtu mwingine anaweza kusajili chapa yako na kuzuia kuingia kwako sokoni.
Faq.brandQ2: Usajili wa alama ya biashara unachukua muda gani?
Faq.brandA2: Kuwasilisha moja kwa moja kwa CNIPA kunachukua miezi 7-12. Teuo la mfumo wa Madrid linachukua miezi 12-18. Tunapendekeza kuanza mchakato kabla ya uzinduzi wa bidhaa yako.
Faq.generalQ1: Gharama ya huduma zenu ni ngapi?
Faq.generalA1: Tunatoa bei zilizowekwa bila gharama zilizofichwa. Gharama halali inategemea aina ya bidhaa yako na mahitaji ya utiifu. Wasiliana nasi kwa tathmini bure na bei iliyobinafsishwa.
Faq.generalQ2: Je, mnafanya kazi na makampuni nje ya vyakula?
Faq.generalA2: Ndiyo. Ingawa tulianza na usajili wa chakula wa GACC, sasa tunatoa huduma za utiifu kwa vipodozi, elektroniki, vichezo, nguo, kemikali, na zaidi.
Faq.generalA3: Timu yetu iko nchini China na ufikiaji wa moja kwa moja kwa mamlaka za kanuni, maabara za upimaji, na vyombo vya uthibitisho. Tunafanya kazi na wateja duniani kote.
Faq.generalQ4: Je, mnaweza kushughulikia mchakato wote kwangu?
Faq.generalA4: Ndiyo. Tunatoa huduma kamili ya mwanzo hadi mwisho — kutoka tathmini ya awali na hati hadi usajili, uthibitisho, na usimamizi wa utiifu unaendelea.

About.heroSubtitle: Mshirika wako wa kuaminika kwa kusogeza kanuni za uagizaji wa China.
About.expertTitle: Kutana na Mtaalamu Wako wa China
About.expertDesc: Kwa uzoefu wa zaidi ya miaka 10 wa kusaidia watengenezaji wa kimataifa kusogeza kanuni ngumu za uagizaji wa China, David amefanikiwa kuongoza mamia ya chapa kupitia usajili wa GACC, utiifu wa lebo, uthibitisho, na kuingia sokoni. Makao yako nchini China, anafanya kazi duniani kote.
About.value1Desc: Ujuzi wa kina wa mandhari ya kanuni za China katika sekta nyingi.
About.value2Desc: Bei zilizowekwa na matokeo wazi — bila gharama zilizofichwa au mshangao.
About.value3Desc: Tunabaki nawe kutoka ushauri wa awali hadi kuingia sokoni kwa utiifu wa mwisho.
About.missionDesc: Kufanya kanuni za uagizaji za China ziweze kufikiwa na kusogezwa na biashara za kimataifa za ukubwa wowote. Tunaamini kuwa utiifu haupaswi kuwa kizuizi cha kuingia sokoni — unapaswa kuwa daraja.
About.ctaSubtitle: Pata tathmini ya utiifu bure kutoka timu yetu ya wataalamu.
About.title: About SinoTrade Compliance
About.subtitle: Your trusted partner for navigating China's import regulations.
About.missionText: To make China's import regulations accessible and navigable for international businesses of all sizes. We believe that compliance shouldn't be a barrier to market entry — it should be a bridge.
About.values: Expertise — Deep knowledge of China's regulatory landscape across multiple industries.,Transparency — Fixed-fee pricing with clear deliverables — no hidden costs or surprises.,Commitment — We stay with you from initial consultation to final compliant market entry.

Expert.title: Kutana na Mtaalamu Wako wa China
Expert.name: David Zhang
Expert.desc: Miaka 10+ ya kusaidia watengenezaji wa Vyakula na Vinywaji kusogeza kanuni za forodha za China. Makao yako nchini China, anafanya kazi duniani kote.

LeadMagnet.title: Tathmini ya Utiifu Bure
LeadMagnet.subtitle: Tuambie kuhusu bidhaa zako na tutatoa ramani ya utiifu iliyobinafsishwa.
LeadMagnet.privacy: Hakuna barua taka. Ondoa wakati wowote.

ThankYou.title: Asante!
ThankYou.subtitle: Tumepokea ombi lako. Timu yetu itakuwasiliana ndani ya masaa 24.
